case_title: CHENS PLUMBING, INC. VS. THOMPSKIN SUSKIND LP

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-04-2009 - JUDGMENT. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHENS PLUMBING, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMPSKIN SUSKIND LP $484.40 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $534.40, (THE JUDGMENT REFLECTS AN OFFSET AGAINST PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM FOR DAMAGES CAUSED BY THE FAILURE OF THE PIPE INSTALLED BY PLAINTIFF. THE MECHANICS LIEN RECORDED BY THE PLAINTIFF ON THE PROPERTY COMMONLY KNOWN AS 3645 AND 3647 WEBSTER STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA IS ORDERED EXPUNDGED.) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,004.40 FILED BY CHENS PLUMBING, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT THOMPSKIN SUSKIND LP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-04-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED JAN-20-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THOMPSKIN SUSKIND LP
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-04-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-04-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
